overview: SHUBH SCHOOL ERP is a comprehensive, fully working School Management System for Indian schools. All modules (Students, Fees, Attendance, HR/Payroll, Academics, Transport, Inventory, Examinations, Communication, Chat, Calling, Reports) work end-to-end with real MySQL data sync — every change saves immediately to the server like WhatsApp Web, with a changelog tracking who changed what.
features: WhatsApp-style real-time data sync — all data loads from MySQL on open, every change saves instantly to server
Role-based permissions — Super Admin controls what each role (Teacher, Admin, Principal, Parent, Student) can read/write/add/delete
Student Information — Excel-style grid with 20+ columns, rich filters, bulk import/export, family grouping
Fees Module — fee headings, class-wise plans, collect fees, receipt with QR, balance carry-forward, dues tracking
Attendance — QR scanner, RFID, ESSL/IP biometric, welcome display, summary reports
HR & Payroll — staff directory, attendance-based salary calculation, payslip generation
Academics — classes/sections CRUD, subjects, timetables, syllabus tracker
Chat System — direct messages + class/section/route group chats with file sharing (WhatsApp-style mobile UI)
Calling System — Heyophone VoIP integration, click-to-call from profiles, call logs
Changelog audit trail — every change tracked with who/what/when for sync and compliance
Backup & Restore — export/import all data, factory reset
